title: Substack vs EmailOctopus (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Substack vs EmailOctopus: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Substack and EmailOctopus comes down to your specific use case. Substack is built for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while EmailOctopus targets budget-conscious creators and small businesses.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on writers monetising directly from subscribers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on budget-conscious creators and small businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Substack wins for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while EmailOctopus is stronger for budget-conscious creators and small businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Substack or EmailOctopus?
faq.a: Substack starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from EmailOctopus to Substack?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
